integration_validation_v2.gap: MT-193 requires Flight Recorder events for build/package guard and stale-doc detection. No such FR events exist. Cited mt_193_restart_resume_full_path tests session restart/resume (WP-KERNEL-004), unrelated to build/package/stale-doc events.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/session_checkpoint_tests.rs:204 (mt_193_restart_resume_full_path — restart/resume, not build/package/stale-doc); src/flight_recorder/fr_event_registry.rs:46,84 (no build/package/stale FR events; registry is WP-KERNEL-004)

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Impl: workflow_event_kinds.rs:58-64,78-80 (BuildGuard/PackageGuard/StaleDocDetected = FR-EVT-BUILD-GUARD/FR-EVT-PACKAGE-GUARD/FR-EVT-STALE-DOC-DETECTED, mt_owner()=MT-193, required fields); persistence + migration 0116:77-81 CHECK pairing. Proof: tests/atelier_dcc_flight_recorder_tests.rs:374 mt193 - persists build-guard pass, package-guard blocked, stale-doc generated_doc_behind_source; re-reads from managed PostgreSQL with EventLedger assertions; FR_WORKFLOW_EVENT_RECORDED folded into event_family::ALL.
